expectedAssertions: report-quality preserves the app-type tailoring actionability question in JSON and Markdown
report-quality does not emit recursive fixtureCandidates for an already-materialized synthetic fixture
the fixture keeps scopeBoundary.shipguardOnly and targetAppsReadOnly explicit
design reports expose designTailoring with tailoredFor, guidanceProfile, sourceSignals, dimensions, and nextAction
designTailoring rejects universal defaults and names app-type-specific motion, haptics, visual-density, and copy guidance
design reports expose designCoherenceBoundary so app-type tailoring does not become target-app remediation
nextAction names owner, manual proof, expected artifact, success condition, and failure meaning
shareable output contains no local absolute paths or private app identifiers
privateDataPolicy: Synthetic public fixture. No private app code, local paths, screenshots, app-specific identifiers, or proprietary text were copied.
sourceQuestion: Did the report tailor advice to the app type instead of applying one universal design rule?
